name: espocrm-ext-togare-tpu
description: Módulo TPU do Togare — sync mensal CNJ + cache Redis (Story 3.3, FR8/FR9/NFR4/NFR17/NFR25) + hook ResolveTpuFieldsHook em Hooks/Processo/ que valida classe/assunto/movimento contra catálogo + denormaliza nomes + Controller TogareTpuCatalog com 3 endpoints search (autocomplete TPU para Story 3.4, FR8, v0.2.0).

scripts.integration-tests: node build --copy && node build --composer-install && cd site && php vendor/bin/phpunit tests/integration/Espo/Modules/TogareTpu

author: Togare
